chunks.text: 2020-21 Archive of Special Events - EECS at Berkeley 2020-21 Archive of Special Events BEARS 2021 To showcase our vision of the long-term future of the department, this year’s virtual research symposium on February 11, 2021, will feature the department’s newest ladder-rank faculty members, covering topics that run the gamut of the EECS spectrum. See 2021 Program Rising Stars 2020 Workshop The Rising Stars 2020 Academic Career Workshop for Women in EECS will be held virtually on November 9-10, 2020. It will bring together senior-level PhD students and postdocs in electrical engineering and computer science for a two-day intensive virtual workshop on the faculty search process. Application deadline: September 7, 2020 Learn More!
